message:
feat(stdlib): add audio/media/utility modules

- Audio: audioop (operations), wave, aifc, sunau, sndhdr (type detection)
- Media: imghdr (image type detection), colorsys (color conversions)
- Utilities: netrc, xdrlib (XDR encoding), plistlib (Apple plists)
- Readline: readline, rlcompleter (GNU readline interface)

files.patch:
